product.name: FlowSync
product.tagline: AI-Powered Project Management for Distributed Teams
product.description: Revolutionize remote collaboration with intelligent workflow automation and real-time team synchronization.

hero.headline: Orchestrate Remote Work with AI Precision
hero.subheadline: FlowSync transforms distributed teams into high-performance units through intelligent project management and seamless collaboration.
hero.image_prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing AI-powered project management interface. Diverse remote team collaborating across digital devices. Clean, professional tech environment with blue, purple, and cyan color accents.

features.title: AI Task Prioritization
features.description: Our advanced AI analyzes team workload, project deadlines, and individual strengths to automatically prioritize tasks for maximum efficiency.

features.title: Smart Timezone Sync
features.description: Seamlessly coordinate across global teams with intelligent timezone management, ensuring smooth communication and minimal scheduling conflicts.

features.title: Automated Standups
features.description: Replace mundane meetings with AI-generated progress reports, capturing key insights and tracking team momentum without manual intervention.

testimonials.name: Sarah Kim
testimonials.quote: FlowSync has transformed how our distributed team collaborates. The AI-driven insights are game-changing for our productivity.

testimonials.name: Michael Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: With FlowSync, we've reduced meeting times by 40% and increased our team's overall efficiency dramatically.

testimonials.name: Emily Chen
testimonials.quote: The smart timezone and task prioritization features are like having an extra team coordinator working 24/7.

final_cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Workflow?
final_cta.subheadline: Join thousands of high-performance teams leveraging AI-powered project management.
